rules: Zero fabrication: never invent lots, owners, phones, emails, or buyer demand.
Public owner records are direct-mail/skip-trace anchors only until verified phone/email enrichment.
Zero-count markets remain visible as source-ready lanes, not hidden.
Agents execute research/data normalization/UI sync; no external outreach without explicit approval.
